emptyHint: Add a run config to crawl on a schedule while the app stays running.
keepRunningHint: Saved. Keep app running for schedules to trigger on time
autoCreatedConfigDesc: Form differs from selected config; auto-created: {name}
configDeleted: Linked run config no longer exists

missedRuns.title: Missed runs detected
missedRuns.desc: While the app was not running, the following run configs missed their scheduled times. You can run them now, or dismiss and resume future schedules from now.
missedRuns.runNowSuccess: Missed runs handled and tasks queued

recommendedHelpP1: If a preset includes a schedule, importing it adds a copy under My configs with scheduled runs turned on by default, using the preset’s plan. You can turn scheduling off or change the plan later there.
recommendedHelpP2: Items in this list cannot be edited here. Import a copy into My configs first, then open it there to edit.
scheduleHelpP1: A run config can turn on scheduled runs: repeat on an interval, daily at a fixed time, or weekly on a chosen weekday and time. Each trigger creates a crawl task automatically.
scheduleHelpP2: Scheduling needs the app process to stay running (foreground or background). Runs fire at the planned time when the device is awake and the app is not force-stopped.
scheduleHelpP3: If the app was not running at the scheduled time, that run may be missed. On the next launch you may see a prompt to run missed schedules now or dismiss and continue from the next planned time.
